\tzpentry{ID3418}{Canon TRAWIN Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3418 introduces Canon TRAWIN Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \dot{\varphi}_i=\omega_i+\frac{1}{N}\sum_j K_{ij}\sin(\varphi_j-\varphi_i)+\eta_i(t) \]
